dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: In a world where life and death hang by a thread, one woman stands at the precipice, wielding a scalpel with unparalleled precision.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Song (Elise)
dialogue.line: Suction. Forceps. Clamp.

dialogue.speaker: Nurse Kim
dialogue.line: Doctor, the patient's blood pressure is dropping rapidly!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Song (Elise)
dialogue.line: Stay calm. We're almost there. I need 10cc of epinephrine, now!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Song (Elise)
dialogue.line: This is it. The moment of truth. Every second counts. Every decision is critical.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Dr. Song, a brilliant surgeon, dedicated her life to saving others. It was her atonement, her penance for a past life she desperately wanted to forget.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BEEP-BEEP-BEEP (heart monitor flatlining)

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Song (Elise)
dialogue.line: No! Not on my watch! Charge to 200!

dialogue.speaker: Nurse Lee
dialogue.line: Charging!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ZAP! (defibrillator)

dialogue.speaker: Nurse Kim
dialogue.line: Pulse is back! It's weak, but it's there!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Song (Elise)
dialogue.line: Good. Now, let's close this up. Carefully.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Song (Elise)
dialogue.line: Another life saved. It's a small comfort, but it's something. Perhaps, one day, I can truly forgive myself for the monster I once was.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: After a grueling 12-hour surgery, Dr. Song boarded a plane for a medical conference abroad. Exhaustion weighed heavily on her, but her mind was already planning the next challenge.

dialogue.speaker: Flight Attendant
dialogue.line: Ladies and gentlemen, we are experiencing some unexpected turbulence. Please remain seated and keep your seatbelts fastened.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUMBLE! SHAKE! (plane turbulence)

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Song (Elise)
dialogue.line: Turbulence? This feels… different.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCREEEEECH! CRACK! (metal tearing)

dialogue.speaker: Passenger
dialogue.line: Ahhh! What's happening!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Song (Elise)
dialogue.line: No… not like this. Not when I finally found my purpose.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: EXPLOSION! (plane crash)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Darkness consumed her. Then, a faint light, a whisper of a forgotten memory…

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASP! (Elise waking up)

dialogue.speaker: Elise
dialogue.line: What… where am I? My head… it hurts.

dialogue.speaker: Elise
dialogue.line: This room… these curtains… This isn't my apartment. This isn't a hospital room. This is…

dialogue.speaker: Elise
dialogue.line: This is my room from my first life! The Clorance Dukedom! But… that's impossible. I died. I was executed!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK (door opening)

dialogue.speaker: Maid
dialogue.line: Young Lady Elise? You're awake! Oh, thank the heavens! You've been unconscious for two days after your fall.

dialogue.speaker: Elise
dialogue.line: Fall? Two days? No… this can't be real. I'm… I'm back. I'm Elise de Clorance again. The villainess…

dialogue.speaker: Elise
dialogue.line: But I'm so young. This must be before… before everything. Before I became the empress's rival. Before I was executed by the Crown Prince.

dialogue.speaker: Maid
dialogue.line: Are you feeling alright, Young Lady? You look a bit pale.

dialogue.speaker: Elise
dialogue.line: I'm… I'm fine, Lily. Just a little disoriented.

dialogue.speaker: Elise
dialogue.line: This is a second chance. No, a third chance. I won't make the same mistakes. I won't be the villainess. I won't pursue the Crown Prince. I will use the knowledge I gained as Dr. Song.

dialogue.speaker: Elise
dialogue.line: I will become a doctor in this life. I will save lives. That is my new destiny.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: With a newfound resolve, the notorious villainess, Elise de Clorance, began her journey to rewrite her fate and become the greatest physician the empire had ever seen.

summary: Dr. Song, a brilliant modern-day surgeon, reflects on her past life as a villainess while saving a patient. After a tragic plane crash, she reawakens as the young Elise de Clorance, realizing she has been granted a third chance to change her fate and become a doctor.
